title: Metro Detroit students gain access to new $5M AI, robotics learning hub
description: Built as part of the district’s 2020 bond program, the Orsa Hub includes flexible collaborative spaces where students can explore robotics, artificial intelligence, virtual reality, augmented reality, entrepreneurship and financial literacy.
content:
CANTON, MI - A metro Detroit school district has opened a new $5 million learning hub focused on artificial intelligence, robotics and other emerging technologies.

title: Study finds that over half of eight-year-olds in Singapore have used AI; the most popular tool is ChatGPT
description: More than half of eight-year-olds in Singapore have used artificial intelligence (AI) tools, with usage rising sharply by ages 10 and 13.
content:
SINGAPORE (The Straits Times/ANN): More than half of eight-year-olds in Singapore have used artificial intelligence (AI) tools, with usage rising sharply by ages 10 and 13.
The most popular app among them is ChatGPT.
